use_cases: SaaS and AI/ML product landing pages needing immersive video backgrounds
Tech companies showcasing AGI or automation platforms with full-screen heroes
Modern dark-themed landing pages with mobile-responsive navigation overlays
ai_summary: A full-screen hero landing page featuring a video background with subtle blue gradient overlays, large typography, and mobile-responsive hamburger navigation. Implements keyboard escape handling and body scroll prevention for mobile menu states. Dark aesthetic with gradient accents suitable for SaaS, AI, and developer tool products.
